title: HeroQuest + AxianQuest Infinite Dungeons = the way it should be played (HeroQuest Solo)
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OH7Rlrq71To

Daniel (@dungeondive) makes a bold claim: HeroQuest paired with the AxianQuest Infinite Dungeons expansion is the way the game should be played solo. The AxianQuest system replaces scripted quest books with procedurally generated dungeons, turning HeroQuest into something closer to Advanced HeroQuest's random exploration — but with better components and modern production values.

This episode covers the Infinite Dungeons system in detail: how dungeon tiles are drawn, how encounters are generated, and why the unpredictability transforms a game built for a human game master into a genuine solo experience. If you've been circling HeroQuest solo play, this might be the video that tips you over the edge.

----

Have you tried AxianQuest or similar procedural add-ons for board games designed around a GM?
